creator: prasad.krishnamurthy@sasken.com
text:
Hi Support Team,

We are running FreeBSD 11.2 on Dell R730 with BCM5720 Quad Port NIC. BCM5720 does not work at all. 

ifconfig says 

bge0: flags=8843<UP,BROADCAST,RUNNING,SIMPLEX,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 1500
        options=c019b<RXCSUM,TXCSUM,VLAN_MTU,VLAN_HWTAGGING,VLAN_HWCSUM,TSO4,VLAN_HWTSO,LINKSTATE>
        ether 20:04:0f:e5:96:86
        hwaddr 20:04:0f:e5:96:86
        inet 10.1.8.17 netmask 0xfffff000 broadcast 10.1.15.255
        nd6 options=29<PERFORMNUD,IFDISABLED,AUTO_LINKLOCAL>
        media: Ethernet autoselect (none)
        status: no carrier

Looks like bge driver issue.

Kindly help on this.

Best Regards,
Prasad Krishnamurthy
